speaker: seller

args.message: Step right up! Feast your eyes on this magnificent 2017 Toyota Sienna XLE, a true gem of a family van that’s practically begging for its next adventure. With Toyota

speaker: buyer

args.message: Let's cut to the chase. What's the complete ownership history of this Sienna, and has it ever been involved in any accidents, no matter how minor? Also, you mentioned a 'recent inspection' – who conducted it, and can I see the report?

text: Let's cut to the chase. What's the complete ownership history of this Sienna, and has it ever been involved in any accidents, no matter how minor? Also, you mentioned a 'recent inspection' – who conducted it, and can I see the report?

speaker: seller

args.message: That's the spirit! I love a buyer who gets straight to the point. This Sienna has had a clean life, just one owner who clearly cherished it. As for accidents, absolutely none to report. It's been a smooth ride all the way. And that recent inspection? Top-notch, done by our certified in-house mechanics. They gave it a full bill of health, and we'd be happy to review the checklist with you.

speaker: seller

args.message: Ah, I see you're a meticulous shopper! That's smart. Our records show it's been a one-owner vehicle, and we pride ourselves on transparency here. Regarding any past incidents, our policy is to disclose anything significant, and this Sienna has a clean slate. The inspection was performed by our master technicians right here on the lot – they're meticulous, as you can see from their glowing report on this beauty!
